description: Amberflo is a platform for AI usage metering, cost attribution, and customer billing. It helps companies track AI and infrastructure usage, understand costs, and generate usage-based billing from the same data.
summary: Amberflo exposes one documented HTTP API at `https://app.amberflo.io`, authenticated with an Amberflo API key in the `X-API-KEY` header; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found.
